title: sphaerostephanos ellipticus
intro: Sphaerostephanos ellipticus, also known as the elliptical fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The elliptical fern has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional folk medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the elliptical fern is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
